issue: Double 'from' is a run-on: 'every 15 minutes from five minutes past the hour from midnight through 12:50 a.m.' reads awkwardly.
'during the 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and 10 p.m. hours' is stilted; the mixed range-plus-singleton over 'hours' is hard to parse on one read.
'until 9 p.m. plus 10:05 p.m.' mixes an exclusive-bound phrasing with an explicit time; slightly uneven but parseable.
Long stacked clause: 'every seven minutes... every six hours from 2 a.m. whenever the day is...' is a lot to hold; correct but dense.
Day order 'a Sunday, or a Saturday' is reversed from natural Sat-then-Sun ordering; mildly jarring.
